title: Table data is lost on DB restart, but only when a table has 2147483647 or more rows.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(test_column Int32 NOT NULL, name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table(test_column, name) SELECT number, 'Test Name' FROM system.numbers LIMIT 2147483647;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE test_column IS NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE test_table DELETE WHERE test_column < 1000;
SELECT AVG(test_column) FROM test_table WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Data loss on DB restart with large table row count
